caption: A person wearing a light-colored, patterned hospital gown holds a newborn baby wrapped in a white cloth and a pink hat. The person's left arm is visible, sporting a tattoo and a black wristwatch. To the right, another individual is partially visible, wearing dark navy blue scrubs with a blue and white patterned detail on the shoulder. The setting appears to be a healthcare environment, with a white bed or surface and pink bedding visible in the foreground. On-screen graphics include a purple silhouette of a pregnant person, a purple circle containing the text "Day 3", and a logo that reads "Sim Week". Throughout the sequence, the person in the gown gently cradles the infant, shifting their hands slightly to support the baby's head and body, while the surrounding environment and other figures remain stationary.
